ogTitle: Bool Lagoon vs Boolgun: Climate Safety

heading: Bool Lagoon vs Boolgun — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bool Lagoon, South Australia and Boolgun, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boolgun has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bool Lagoon (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bool Lagoon or Boolgun safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bool Lagoon has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Boolgun scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bool Lagoon scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Boolgun scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bool Lagoon or Boolgun?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boolgun has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
